prompt:
Update your expertise file to reflect the Phase 8 build pipeline work you just completed. Add a session entry covering:

1. tsup installed as devDependency (v8.5.1)
2. Created tsup.config.ts with two entry points: library (ESM+CJS+dts, commander external) and CLI binary (bundled, node shebang via banner)
3. Updated package.json: main→dist/index.cjs, module→dist/index.js, types→dist/index.d.ts, dual exports with types conditions, bin→dist/bin.js, files→dist/, engines→node>=20, added build script
4. Removed hardcoded shebang from bin.ts (tsup banner handles it)
5. Node.js compat audit: no Bun-specific APIs found — codebase already uses node:fs/promises
6. Build produces: dist/index.js (ESM), dist/index.cjs (CJS), dist/index.d.ts, dist/index.d.cts, dist/bin.js + sourcemaps
7. All quality gates pass: 549 tests, 1950 assertions
8. Verified: CJS import, ESM import, CLI binary --help/--version all work

No code changes needed — just expertise update.

response_preview:
The file looks correct — valid YAML, all sections properly indented, phase_8 entry present with all 8 requested details. The expertise update is complete with:

- **`expertise_status`** line 9 — Phase 1-8, 1950 assertions, tsup build pipeline
- **`project_structure`** line 14 — shebang note updated
- **`build_and_run`** lines 24-36 — 7 new entries for tsup, build output, package.json config, Node.js compat, build script
- **`dependencies`** lines 39-40 — tsup ^8.5.1, commander externalized
- **`
